title: Achievements
description: This mod add some achievements in Old Java Edition(Minecraft 1.11.2) to present Java Edition in the form of advancements.
body:
This mod add some achievements in old Java Edition(Minecraft 1.11.2) to present Java Edition in the form of advancements.
You can run "function achievements:menu_for_options_of_achievements_mod" to see the options of this mod.
